ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "busto" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "vita" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "fianchi" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches and centimeters */,
  "taglia" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "it" INTEGER /* Italian size equivalent */,
  "uk" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "eur" INTEGER /* European size equivalent */,
  "de" INTEGER /* German size equivalent */,
  "fr" INTEGER /* French size equivalent */,
  "usa" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "aus" INTEGER /* Australian size equivalent */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric used for the garment */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the garment */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the garment is designed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country of residence */,
  "preferred_region" INTEGER /* Customer's preferred region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_region FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "customer_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry for a customer */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "busto" TEXT /* Bust measurement input by the customer */,
  "vita" TEXT /* Waist measurement input by the customer */,
  "fianchi" TEXT /* Hip measurement input by the customer */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used by the customer */,
  "preferred_size_label" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "source_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source size */,
  "target_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target size */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor used for size conversion */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion */,
  "conversion_formula" TEXT /* Formula used for the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_target_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_source_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code used to identify the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchased product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return request */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was requested */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "return_reason_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size entry */,
  "purchases" INTEGER /* Number of purchases for this size */,
  "returns" INTEGER /* Number of returns for this size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "size_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of each size purchased in a region */,
  "size_return_rate" REAL /* Return rate for each size in a region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login for the admin */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts made by the admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
